# Browsing Files

RiverDrop's dual-pane layout is designed for maximum efficiency when managing your local and remote projects.

## Dual-Pane Layout

The interface is split into two main sections:
- **Left Pane**: Your local files (Mac).
- **Right Pane**: The remote server (SFTP/rsync).

You can resize the panes by dragging the divider between them.

![Dual-Pane Browser](images/dual-pane.png){fig-alt="RiverDrop's dual-pane interface"}

## Local Browser Features

The local pane offers a native Mac experience:
- **Navigation**: Click a folder to enter it. Click the breadcrumbs to jump back.
- **Go Home (⌘+1)**: Quickly return to your local home directory.
- **Bookmarks**: Save frequently visited folders using the **Bookmark** icon (★).
- **Open in Finder**: Right-click a folder to open it in macOS Finder.
- **Hidden Files (⌘+⇧+.)**: Toggle visibility of hidden files (those starting with `.`).

::: {.callout-tip}
To navigate to a specific path, use the **Go to Folder (⌘+⇧+G)** shortcut.
:::

## Remote Browser Features

The remote pane provides specialized tools for HPC and server management:
- **Breadcrumbs**: Jump to any parent directory instantly.
- **Home/Scratch Toggle**: Quick access to your home directory or a `/not_backed_up` (Scratch) partition if available.
- **Hidden Files (⌘+⇧+,)**: Toggle hidden files independently from the local view.
- **Status Badges**: Indicators for new or recently downloaded files.

![Remote Browser Toolbar](images/remote-toolbar.png){fig-alt="The remote browser toolbar and segmented picker"}

## Common File Operations

In both panes, you can perform standard file management:
- **Rename**: Right-click an item and select **Rename...**.
- **Delete/Trash**: Select an item and press **Delete**. Local files are moved to the Trash, while remote files are permanently deleted (with confirmation).
- **Multi-select**: Use ⌘+click to select multiple files or ⇧+click for a range.
- **Copy Path**: Right-click to copy the absolute path of a file or folder.
- **Refresh (⌘+R)**: Manually reload the directory listing.
